docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-12-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF WILLY UONG. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JAMES WONG WITH SELF PROVIDED CANTONESE INTERPRETER NANCY WONG. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY UONG, WILLY AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JAMES AKA JAMES KL WONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF UONG, WILLY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-09-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JAMES AKA JAMES KL WONG

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UONG, WILLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, JAMES AKA JAMES KL WONG $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $935.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JAMES AKA JAMES KL WONG
